description: Chat detects natural-language headcount change and emits update_project_field action

messages.content: Actually Lumen has 160 staff now, not 120. Please update the programme.

data.brief: Lumen, a fintech startup, 120 people today

response.reply:
Got it — bumping headcount from 120 to 160 is a material change. At flex ratio 0.75 that means ~120 workstations (up from 90), plus proportional scaling of meeting rooms, phone booths, and social areas per typical programming ratios (Leesman 2024, `design://office-programming`).

I'll persist the new headcount first; after you confirm, re-run the brief synthesis so the programme reflects 160 FTE.
